jd_text: We are seeking a highly experienced Chief Financial Officer (CFO) with a strong background in IPO-listed companies and proven expertise in stock-listed FMCG organizations in Saudi Arabia . Key Requirements: Minimum 10+ years of senior financial leadership experience Proven experience working with IPO-listed / publicly traded companies Strong background in FMCG industry (Saudi market preferred) Deep knowledge of: Financial strategy & planning IPO readiness & compliance Corporate governance Financial reporting (IFRS) Budgeting, forecasting & cost control Experience dealing with capital markets, investors, and regulatory authorities Strong leadership and team management skills Key Responsibilities: Lead overall financial strategy and planning Manage IPO processes, investor relations, and compliance Oversee financial reporting, audits, and risk management Drive business growth and profitability Ensure compliance with Saudi regulations and financial standards Preferred: Experience with Tadawul-listed companies Strong network within Saudi financial and investment sectors
